##NAMES=Alluaudite
##RRUFFID=R160080
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[box]NaMnFe^3+^_2_(PO_4_)_3_
##LOCALITY=Buranga pegmatite, Gatumba District, Western Province, Rwanda
##OWNER=UAMM
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Vitreous, brownish-yellow large platelets in clusters with good cleavage in and on dark brown siliceous matrix.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R160080
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_0.70_Mn_0.23_Ca_0.07_)Mn_1.00_(Fe^3+^_1.50_Al_0.29_Mg_0.10_Mn_0.11_)(PO_4_)_3_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.0146 b: 12.5519 c: 6.4109 alpha: 90 beta: 114.267 gamma: 90 volume: 881.38 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
